zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Stewart於1425年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可斯瓦福哈姆時，他的父親Thomas Steward Of Swaffham40歲，母親Cecily Hamerton37歲。他和Alice Boreley至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1496年在英國諾福爾可斯瓦福哈姆享年71歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可斯瓦福哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Stewart于1425年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可斯瓦福哈姆时，他的父亲Thomas Steward Of Swaffham40岁，母亲Cecily Hamerton37岁。他和Alice Boreley至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1496年在英国諾福爾可斯瓦福哈姆享年71岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可斯瓦福哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Stewart was born in 1425, in Swaffham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Steward Of Swaffham, was 40 and his mother, Cecily Hamerton, was 37. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Alice Boreley. He died in 1496, in Swaffham, Norfolk, England, at the age of 71, and was buried in Swaffham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Stewart est né en 1425, à Swaffham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Steward Of Swaffham, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Cecily Hamerton, avait 37 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Alice Boreley. Il est décédé en 1496, à Swaffham, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Swaffham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Stewart 1425 in Swaffham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Steward Of Swaffham 40 und seine Mutter Cecily Hamerton 37. Er hatte mit Alice Boreley mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1496 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Swaffham, Norfolk, England und wurde in Swaffham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Stewart è nato il nel 1425 nel Swaffham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Steward Of Swaffham, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Cecily Hamerton, aveva 37 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Alice Boreley. Morì nel 1496, nel Swaffham, Norfolk, England, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Swaffham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Stewartが1425年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクスワフハムで生まれた時，父Thomas Steward Of Swaffhamは40歳，母Cecily Hamertonは37歳であった。彼はAlice Boreleyとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1496年にイギリスノーフォルクスワフハムで71歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクスワフハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Stewart(이)가 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 스와프함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Steward Of Swaffham(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily Hamerton(은)는 37세였다. 그는 Alice Boreley(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1496년 영국 노르폴크 스와프함에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 스와프함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Stewart nasceu em 1425, em Swaffham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Steward Of Swaffham, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Hamerton, tinha 37 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Alice Boreley. Ele faleceu em 1496, em Swaffham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Swaffham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Stewart родился в 1425 г. в местности сваффхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Steward Of Swaffham было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily Hamerton, 37. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Alice Boreley. Он умер в 1496 г. в местности сваффхам, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности сваффхам, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Stewart nació en 1425, en Swaffham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Steward Of Swaffham, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Cecily Hamerton, tenía 37 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Alice Boreley. Murió en 1496, en Swaffham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Swaffham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
